_comment: Master question pool. Each run picks a random subset, solves them, then removes them and tops the pool back up from `replenish_pool`.

active_pool.title: Valid Parentheses
active_pool.prompt: Given a string s containing just the characters '(', ')', '{', '}', '[' and ']', determine if the input string is valid. Brackets must close in the correct order.

active_pool.title: Merge Two Sorted Lists
active_pool.prompt: Merge two sorted linked lists and return it as a sorted list.

active_pool.title: Course Schedule
active_pool.prompt: There are numCourses you have to take, labeled from 0 to numCourses - 1. You are given an array prerequisites. Return true if you can finish all courses.

active_pool.title: LRU Cache
active_pool.prompt: Design a data structure that follows the constraints of a Least Recently Used (LRU) cache. Implement get and put in O(1).

active_pool.title: House Robber
active_pool.prompt: You are a professional robber planning to rob houses along a street. You cannot rob two adjacent houses. Given an integer array nums representing the amount of money of each house, return the maximum amount of money you can rob tonight.

active_pool.title: Kth Largest Element in an Array
active_pool.prompt: Given an integer array nums and an integer k, return the kth largest element in the array.

active_pool.title: Top K Frequent Elements
active_pool.prompt: Given an integer array nums and an integer k, return the k most frequent elements.

active_pool.title: Unique Paths
active_pool.prompt: A robot is located at the top-left corner of a m x n grid. The robot can only move down or right. How many possible unique paths are there to reach the bottom-right corner?

active_pool.title: Happy Number
active_pool.prompt: Write an algorithm to determine if a number n is happy. A happy number is defined by the process of replacing the number by the sum of the squares of its digits until it equals 1 or loops.

active_pool.title: Sliding Window Maximum
active_pool.prompt: Given an array nums and a sliding window of size k, return the max element in each window.

active_pool.title: Merge Intervals
active_pool.prompt: Given an array of intervals, merge all overlapping intervals.

active_pool.title: Insert Interval
active_pool.prompt: Insert a new interval into a list of non-overlapping intervals and merge if necessary.

active_pool.title: Combination Sum
active_pool.prompt: Given an array of distinct integers candidates and a target integer target, return a list of all unique combinations of candidates where the chosen numbers sum to target.

active_pool.title: Rotting Oranges
active_pool.prompt: Given an m x n grid where each cell can have one of three values, return the minimum number of minutes that must elapse until no cell has a fresh orange.

active_pool.title: Maximum Depth of Binary Tree
active_pool.prompt: Given the root of a binary tree, return its maximum depth.

active_pool.title: Linked List Cycle
active_pool.prompt: Given head, the head of a linked list, determine if the linked list has a cycle in it.

active_pool.title: Valid Anagram
active_pool.prompt: Given two strings s and t, return true if t is an anagram of s.

active_pool.title: Encode and Decode Strings
active_pool.prompt: Design an algorithm to encode a list of strings to a single string. The encoded string is then sent over the network and is decoded back to the original list of strings.

active_pool.title: Search a 2D Matrix
active_pool.prompt: You are given an m x n integer matrix with sorted rows and a target integer. Return true if target is in matrix.

active_pool.title: Decode Ways
active_pool.prompt: A message containing letters from A-Z can be encoded into numbers (A=1, ..., Z=26). Given a string s containing only digits, return the number of ways to decode it.

active_pool.title: Longest Increasing Subsequence
active_pool.prompt: Given an integer array nums, return the length of the longest strictly increasing subsequence.

active_pool.title: Partition Equal Subset Sum
active_pool.prompt: Given a non-empty array nums containing only positive integers, find if the array can be partitioned into two subsets such that the sum of elements in both subsets is equal.
